about.subtitle: About Me
about.title: Building Modern Full-Stack Experiences with Scalable Technologies
about.text:
I’m Tanju, a full-stack web developer based in Germany with a strong focus on modern frontend engineering, scalable backend architecture, and user-centered application design.

Before transitioning into software development, I spent over a decade working as a medical officer in the Turkish Naval Forces. That experience shaped the way I approach challenges today — with discipline, responsibility, adaptability, and the ability to perform under pressure.

My academic background in business and law also strengthened my analytical thinking, structured problem-solving, and decision-making skills, which continue to influence the way I design and develop software systems.

After moving to Germany in 2022, I fully committed myself to software development while simultaneously learning German and adapting to a new environment. Over the past years, I have built multiple full-stack applications using technologies such as React, TypeScript, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Redux Toolkit Query, and Next.js. My projects focus on real-world architecture, scalable state management, authentication systems, API integrations, and responsive user experiences.

I enjoy solving complex problems, improving application architecture, and turning ideas into clean, maintainable products. In recent months, I revisited and rebuilt several older projects using more modern patterns and production-inspired workflows, which significantly improved both my technical skills and development approach.

Beyond technical skills, I bring a strong work ethic, continuous learning mindset, and long-term commitment to growth. I’m especially interested in frontend engineering, full-stack development, and building modern digital experiences with scalable technologies.
